description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: For the electronic artist you search for by name, filter to studio albums released in or after 2010, sort them by total duration, and add the single longest one to your Favorites.
tasks.name: For the electronic artist you search for by name, filter to studio albums released in or after 2010, sort them by total duration, and add the single longest one to your Favorites.

tasks.instruction: For the electronic artist you search for by name, pick tracks under 4 minutes from at least two different albums and create a new playlist named "Short Solar Mix" containing exactly 5 such tracks.

tasks.instruction: Compare the number of albums released from 2016 onward by the artists "Midnight Parade" and "Crystal Harbor" and follow whichever artist has more such albums.

tasks.instruction: In the Electronic genre, filter albums released between 2018 and 2022 with a rating of at least 4.5 and at least 8 tracks, sort by rating from high to low, and bookmark the top-rated album.

tasks.instruction: For the jazz artist you search for by name, filter their albums to live recordings with a total duration under 40 minutes and add the first two results in that filtered list to the playback queue.

tasks.instruction: For the indie rock artist you search for by name, select one album from 1990–1999, one from 2000–2009, and one from 2010–2019, and add each of these three albums to your "Listen Later" collection.

tasks.instruction: Search for albums whose titles include the words "Greatest Hits", open the first such album, filter its tracks to those at least 7 minutes long, and open the detailed info view for the first qualifying track.

tasks.instruction: In the collaborations or "Appears On" section for the pop artist you search for by name, add 1 album released before 2015 and 2 albums released in or after 2015 to a custom list named "Duet Projects".

tasks.instruction: In the Indie Rock genre, filter to EPs released in 2020 with total duration under 25 minutes, sort by popularity from high to low, and add the first two EPs in the list to your Library.
